name: German Chocolate Cheesecake Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, dissolve yeast in warm water.
2. Add sugar, salt, egg, butter or margarine, and 1 cup of flour. Beat until smooth.
3. Gradually add remaining flour to form a soft dough. Turn onto a floured board.
4. Knead until smooth and elastic, about 3-5 minutes. Place in a greased bowl, turning once to grease the top. Cover and let rest for 20 minutes.
5. Punch dough down. Press into the bottom and up the sides of a greased 15x10x1 inch baking pan.
6. In a large mixing bowl, beat cream cheese until smooth. Gradually add cocoa and sugar. Beat until fluffy.
7. Beat in eggs, one at a time, then add vanilla. Pour into crust.
8. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes or until the crust is golden brown. Cool.
9. In a saucepan, combine first four topping ingredients. Cook over low heat until thick, about 8-10 minutes, stirring constantly.
10. Remove from the heat and stir in vanilla, coconut, and nuts. Spread over cooled cake.
11. Chill at least 1 hour. Store in refrigerator.
